title: Return (error code) of xCurrentTime is always ignored
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, name String NOT NULL, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
SELECT id, name, formatDateTime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') AS formatted_date FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE created_at = now() WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Ignoring return value of xCurrentTime function
